title: Who Buys AI Wearables and Offline Conversation APIs?

pages.title: Four Signals Of Customer Fit
pages.kicker: The strongest buyers can turn missing offline context into measurable workflow value.

cards.title: Frequent offline work
cards.body: Important conversations happen beyond online meeting integrations.

cards.title: Measurable next step
cards.body: Captured context changes a CRM, clinical, legal, or field workflow.

cards.title: Acceptable capture
cards.body: Users understand the device, consent boundary, and review process.

cards.title: Sustainable economics
cards.body: Workflow value can support hardware, processing, and fleet operations.

pages.title: What Buyers Must Inspect
pages.kicker: A polished transcript demo says little about infrastructure quality at fleet scale.

cards.title: Capture reliability
cards.body: Test interruption, backlog recovery, battery, storage, and route changes.

cards.title: Governance
cards.body: Verify tenancy, consent, retention, deletion, audit, and export behavior.

cards.title: Fleet burden
cards.body: Price inventory, replacement, firmware, returns, and end-user support.

cards.title: Exit path
cards.body: Keep source audio, identifiers, schemas, and event semantics portable.
